module_description: Monitors UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) status via NUT (Network UPS Tools). Alerts on power failures, low battery, and abnormal UPS states.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable UPS monitoring for this entry.
hints.threads: Number of UPS units to check in parallel.
hints.timeout: TCP connection timeout in seconds. Per-item value overrides the module-level default.
hints.host: Hostname or IP of the NUT UPSD server.
hints.port: NUT UPSD TCP port. Leave empty (0) to use the standard port 3493.
hints.ups_name: UPS name as configured in NUT (default: ups).
hints.user: Username for NUT authentication. Leave empty for unauthenticated access (status reads need no auth).
hints.alert_on_battery: Raise an alert when the UPS switches to battery power (status OB).
hints.alert_battery: Alert when the battery drops below this percentage. Per-item value overrides the global; blank uses the global (0 at module level = disabled).
hints.alert_runtime: Alert when the estimated runtime drops below this many minutes. Per-item value overrides the global; blank uses the global (0 at module level = disabled).
hints.alert_load: Alert when the UPS load rises above this percentage. Per-item value overrides the global; blank uses the global (0 at module level = disabled).

rename_item_prompt: Enter new UPS name or identifier:
